docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY DEXTER, DOUGLAS E

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-08-2005 IN 206, DEFENDANT WATERWORKS, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/27/05 IS CONTINUED TO 9/26/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: DIANNE HAKEWILL/VERA MU REPORTER: NOREEM IKEUYE, #3538 (206)
